title: sida ovata
intro: Sida ovata, also known as Country Mallow or Bala, is a plant species native to tropical Asia and Africa, belonging to the Malvaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sida ovata include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and expectorant. Sida ovata can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
